intent: Navigate to Settings > mTLS, generate an admin client cert, copy it to clipboard.

keyframes.caption: App launches on Planner; cursor drifts down sidebar to 'Settings', click transitions detail pane.
Settings screen visible: System, Fleet Server, Logging sections stacked; ScrollView reveals 'mTLS Admin' header below.
User scrolls down; 'mTLS Admin' section comes into view with CA fingerprint display and two buttons: 'Generate Cert', 'Copy PEM'.
Cursor clicks 'Generate Admin Cert'; button shows spinner, status line reads 'issuing cert, CN=admin@local ...'.
Cert block populates: PEM text area fills with '-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----' and monospaced base64; SHA256 thumbprint row appears.
Cursor taps 'Copy PEM'; button briefly inverts colour, toast slides up reading 'Copied admin cert to clipboard'.
Toast still on screen, PEM text area unchanged; status footer shows 'Last issued: just now - valid 90d'.

verification.note: Placeholder artefacts - real recording pending on user Mac (Accessibility + Screen Recording permission required)
